notableEvents.label: Nick Sogard GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nick Sogard grounds into a double play, second baseman Orlando Arcia to shortstop Ryan Kreidler to first baseman Kody Clemens. Willson Contreras out at 2nd. Nick Sogard out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Josh Bell reaches on a fielder's choice. Trevor Larnach to 3rd. Austin Martin to 2nd. Fielding error by first baseman Willson Contreras.

notableEvents.label: Ceddanne Rafaela reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Ceddanne Rafaela reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Brooks Lee.

notableEvents.label: Andruw Monasterio pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andruw Monasterio pops out to first baseman Kody Clemens.

notableEvents.label: Masataka Yoshida pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Masataka Yoshida grounds into a force out, second baseman Orlando Arcia to shortstop Ryan Kreidler. Willson Contreras to 3rd. Ceddanne Rafaela out at 2nd. Masataka Yoshida to 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Ceddanne Rafaela reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Brooks Lee.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Ceddanne Rafaela reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Brooks Lee.
